subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Praise be to God that thou art aware and vigilant, and at every daybreak dost engage in the glorification and praise of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی الحمد لله آگاهی و پرانتباهی و در هر صبحگاهی بتسبیح و تقدیس الهی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for parents, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
